breaches.details: 700 million user records leaked including emails and passwords. Change your password immediately and enable 2FA.

153 million records breached including IDs, encrypted passwords, and password hints.

3 billion accounts affected. Names, emails, and hashed passwords exposed.
270 million users affected. Usernames and passwords were leaked.
43 million users affected. Email addresses and passwords exposed.
4.6 million users affected. Phone numbers and usernames exposed.

57 million users affected. Driver account information exposed.
